title: Barren Plateaus: Vanishing Gradients and Mitigation Strategies
description: In-depth analysis of the barren plateau phenomenon in variational quantum circuits, its causes, detection methods, and strategies for mitigation.
learningObjectives: Understand the mathematical origins of barren plateaus
Identify circuits susceptible to vanishing gradients
Apply mitigation strategies including initialization and architecture design
Design trainable circuits avoiding barren plateaus
